title: geranium potentilloides var. ardjunense
intro: Geranium potentilloides var. ardjunense, also known as the Kashmir rose or rose geranium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oil rich in geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Geranium potentilloides var. ardjunense include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oil extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
